description_long: This rifle features a robust metal receiver and barrel assembly, complemented by a wooden stock and handguard, giving it a classic military appearance. The stock is fixed and made from dark-stained wood, providing a sturdy shoulder rest. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a prominent flash hider. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine located just ahead of the trigger guard. Iron sights are mounted along the top of the receiver and barrel for aiming. The overall design suggests durability and reliability, suitable for both urban and field environments.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden stock, metal receiver, and a long barrel with a flash hider, featuring a detachable box magazine and iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, flash hider, and the narrow profile of the barrel and stock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, handguard, detachable magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with details of the magazine and trigger area visible.
